title: scutellaria navicularis
intro: Scutellaria navicularis, also known as Helmet-flower, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, native to China and Southeast Asia. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Scutellaria navicularis include reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and improving respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Scutellaria navicularis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health ailments.
